perturbation.original_text: Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, Licensor hereby grants to Licensee, and Licensee hereby accepts from Licensor, a personal, non-exclusive, royalty-free right and license to use the Licensed Mark solely and exclusively as a component of Licensee's own corporate name and in connection with marketing the investment management, investment consultation and investment advisory services that Investment Advisor may provide to Licensee. During the term of this Agreement, Licensee shall use the Licensed Mark only to the extent permitted under this License, and except as provided above, neither Licensee nor any affiliate, owner, director, officer, employee or agent thereof shall otherwise use the Licensed Mark or any derivative thereof in the Territory without the prior express written consent of Licensor in its sole and absolute discretion and shall not use the Licensed Mark for any purpose outside the Territory. All rights not expressly granted to Licensee hereunder shall remain the exclusive property of the Licensor.
perturbation.changed_text: Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, Licensor hereby grants to Licensee, and Licensee hereby accepts from Licensor, a personal, non-exclusive, right and license to use the Licensed Mark solely and exclusively as a component of Licensee's own corporate name and in connection with marketing the investment management, investment consultation and investment advisory services that Investment Advisor may provide to Licensee. During the term of this Agreement, Licensee shall use the Licensed Mark only to the extent permitted under this License, and except as provided above, neither Licensee nor any affiliate, owner, director, officer, employee or agent thereof shall otherwise use the Licensed Mark or any derivative thereof in the Territory without the prior express written consent of Licensor in its sole and absolute discretion and shall not use the Licensed Mark for any purpose outside the Territory. All rights not expressly granted to Licensee hereunder shall remain the exclusive property of the Licensor.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the term "royalty-free" the definition of the license grant now implies the possibility of royalties. This creates an in-text contradiction, because other sections operate under the assumption that the license is royalty-free, thus changing the definition creates ambiguity and uncertainty for enforcement. This contradicts with section 1.1, since the contract explicitly states that the license is royalty-free.
perturbation.contradicted_text: License. Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, Licensor hereby grants to Licensee, and Licensee hereby accepts from Licensor, a personal, non-exclusive, royalty-free right and license to use the Licensed Mark solely and exclusively as a component of Licensee's own corporate name and in connection with marketing the investment management, investment consultation and investment advisory services that Investment Advisor may provide to Licensee. During the term of this Agreement, Licensee shall use the Licensed Mark only to the extent permitted under this License, and except as provided above, neither Licensee nor any affiliate, owner, director, officer, employee or agent thereof shall otherwise use the Licensed Mark or any derivative thereof in the Territory without the prior express written consent of Licensor in its sole and absolute discretion and shall not use the Licensed Mark for any purpose outside the Territory. All rights not expressly granted to Licensee hereunder shall remain the exclusive property of the Licensor.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the term "royalty-free" from the license grant, creating a contradiction with the contradicted text, which explicitly states the license is royalty-free. This omission introduces ambiguity regarding whether royalties are applicable, directly conflicting with the original terms and creating potential for disputes.

perturbation.original_text: In order to preserve the inherent value of the Licensed Mark, Licensee agrees to use reasonable efforts to ensure that it maintains the quality of the Licensee's business and the operation thereof equal to the standards prevailing in the operation of Licensee's business as of the Effective Date. The Licensee further agrees to use the Licensed Mark in accordance with such quality standards as may be reasonably established by Licensor and communicated to the Licensee from time to time in writing, or as may be agreed to by Licensor and the Licensee from time to time in writing.
perturbation.changed_text: Licensee agrees to use reasonable efforts to ensure that it maintains the quality of the Licensee's business and the operation thereof equal to the standards prevailing in the operation of Licensee's business. The Licensee further agrees to use the Licensed Mark in accordance with such quality standards as may be reasonably established by Licensor and communicated to the Licensee from time to time in writing, or as may be agreed to by Licensor and the Licensee from time to time in writing.
perturbation.explanation: By omitting "as of the Effective Date" it is now ambiguous to what extent the quality should be maitained, thus creating an in-text contradiction. The contract now lacks a clear benchmark for the quality of the Licensee's business, because there is no specific date to reference anymore. This is particularly contradictory, because it means the licensee is supposed to maintain a quality benchmark, that the contract doesn't describe properly, thus causing uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Quality Control. Licensee agrees to use reasonable efforts to ensure that it maintains the quality of the Licensee's business and the operation thereof equal to the standards prevailing in the operation of Licensee's business. The Licensee further agrees to use the Licensed Mark in accordance with such quality standards as may be reasonably established by Licensor and communicated to the Licensee from time to time in writing, or as may be agreed to by Licensor and the Licensee from time to time in writing.
perturbation.justification: The omission of "as of the Effective Date" from the original text creates a strong in-text contradiction. The changed text, when compared to the contradicted text, lacks a crucial reference point for determining the quality standards of the Licensee's business. Without this date, there is no defined benchmark, making it ambiguous how the Licensee should maintain the quality of their business, directly conflicting with the requirement to maintain a specific quality standard. This ambiguity causes uncertainty and potential disputes, thus it constitutes an in-text contradiction as defined under Omissions - In Text Contradiction. The Changed Text's omission directly contradicts the Contradicted Text because the Contradicted Text is instructing how to maintain a quality benchmark, when the Changed Text doesn't properly define what that benchmark is, leading to uncertainty.

perturbation.original_text: Upon expiration or termination of this Agreement, all rights granted to Licensee under this Agreement with respect to the Licensed Mark shall cease, and Licensee shall immediately delete the term "Palmer Square" from its corporate name and shall discontinue all other use of the Licensed Mark. For twenty-four (24) months following termination of this Agreement, Licensee shall specify on all public-facing materials in a prominent place and in prominent typeface that Licensee is no longer operating under the Licensed Mark, is no longer associated with Licensor, or such other notice as may be deemed necessary by Licensor in its sole discretion in its prosecution, defense, and/or settlement of any Third Party Claim.
perturbation.changed_text: Upon expiration or termination of this Agreement, all rights granted to Licensee under this Agreement with respect to the Licensed Mark shall cease, and Licensee shall immediately delete the term "Palmer Square" from its corporate name and shall discontinue all other use of the Licensed Mark. Licensee shall specify on all public-facing materials in a prominent place and in prominent typeface that Licensee is no longer operating under the Licensed Mark, is no longer associated with Licensor, or such other notice as may be deemed necessary by Licensor in its sole discretion in its prosecution, defense, and/or settlement of any Third Party Claim.
perturbation.explanation: By omitting the period of "twenty-four (24) months" now contradicts the specification requirement, and thus creates an in-text contradiction. Because, there is no time limit specification to the statement being made after the termination of the aggreement. The licensee must specify on public facing materials that is no longer working with the licensor, however it is unspecified for how long. This contradicts Article 4.2, since there is no longer a clear obligation to comply with a specification after termination of this aggreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Upon Termination. Upon expiration or termination of this Agreement, all rights granted to Licensee under this Agreement with respect to the Licensed Mark shall cease, and Licensee shall immediately delete the term "Palmer Square" from its corporate name and shall discontinue all other use of the Licensed Mark. Licensee shall specify on all public-facing materials in a prominent place and in prominent typeface that Licensee is no longer operating under the Licensed Mark, is no longer associated with Licensor, or such other notice as may be deemed necessary by Licensor in its sole discretion in its prosecution, defense, and/or settlement of any Third Party Claim.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies a 24-month period for the licensee to specify their disassociation with the licensor. The changed text removes this 24-month period, creating an open-ended obligation with no specified duration. This contradicts the contradicted text, since there is no longer a clear obligation to comply with a specification after termination of this aggreement. This omission introduces a contradiction by creating ambiguity and uncertainty about the duration of the obligation to specify disassociation, potentially leading to disputes over enforceability.
